overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game showing flight over a snowy mountainous planet surface. The spacecraft ascends into space revealing a starfield, then pitches back down toward the planetary terrain. Features detailed amber HUD elements and realistic atmospheric lighting transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude flight over snow-covered mountain range

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft low over snowy mountain terrain, maintaining steady altitude with hand on control stick

entered.detail: amber holographic flight instrument panel showing NO TARGET and radar displays
white gloved hand gripping the flight control stick
rugged snow-covered peaks and valleys stretching to the horizon
faint lights from distant spacecraft or stations visible in the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person cockpit view flying low over a vast snow-covered mountain range. The pilot's gloved hand is visible on the control stick while amber HUD displays provide flight data. The terrain below features rugged white peaks under a dark sky.

events.description: spacecraft pitches sharply upward transitioning from atmospheric flight to space
view transitions to deep space with dense starfield visible and planet curvature at bottom of frame

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft upward into space, leaving the planetary atmosphere behind as the view opens to stars

entered.detail: dense field of stars against the blackness of space
cluster of distant illuminated structures or ships in deep space

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft ascends into space, pitching upward until the view shows mostly starfield with the planet's curved horizon at the bottom. The cockpit HUD remains visible but the pilot's hand and detailed terrain exit the frame as the environment transitions to the darkness of space with distant lights visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending flight toward snow-covered mountain range

events.description: spacecraft pitches downward returning to planetary atmosphere and mountain terrain view

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft back down toward the snowy planet surface, hand visible on controls again as terrain comes into view

entered.detail: white gloved hand returns to view gripping the control stick
snow-covered mountain terrain coming back into clear view as the ship descends

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft descends back toward the planet, pitching down to reveal the snowy mountain range once again. The pilot's hand reappears on the control stick as the view transitions from starfield back to the detailed white terrain below, completing the flight maneuver.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective that ascends from a snowy planetary surface into the void of space before diving back down toward the terrain. It begins with a low-altitude flight over a vast range of rugged white peaks under a dark sky, with the pilot's gloved hand on the control stick and amber HUD displays active. As the spacecraft pitches upward, the detailed mountain terrain exits the frame and the environment transitions into the darkness of space, revealing a starfield and the curved horizon of the planet. The scene then shifts as the craft pitches back down, moving from the starry expanse toward the planetary surface. Finally, the view returns to the snowy mountain range as the pilot's hand reappears on the controls, completing the flight maneuver.
